title: FY2024 Annual Financial Statements Submission
description: Submit audited FY2024 annual financial statements to Ministry of Finance per MoF-DIR-2024-012.
notes: Submitted ahead of deadline. Unqualified audit opinion.

title: FY2024 Annual Financial Statements Submission
description: Submit audited FY2024 annual financial statements to Ministry of Finance.
notes: Audit in progress by Ernst and Young Zambia. Emphasis of matter paragraph expected on mine rehabilitation fund.

title: FY2024 Annual Financial Statements Submission
description: Submit audited FY2024 annual financial statements to Ministry of Finance.
notes: Unqualified opinion with emphasis of matter on going concern. Submitted on time.

title: FY2024 Annual Financial Statements Submission
description: Submit audited FY2024 annual financial statements to Ministry of Finance.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to fixed asset register issues. Submission delayed pending board approval of accounts.

title: Q1 2025 Quarterly Performance Reports — All SOEs
description: All SOEs to submit Q1 2025 quarterly performance reports to Ministry of Finance within 30 days of quarter end.
notes: All SOEs submitted on time except Zambia Railways (submitted 3 days late).

title: Mine Rehabilitation Fund Actuarial Review
description: Complete independent actuarial review per MoF-DIR-2023-018.
notes: Preliminary findings indicate ZMW 570 million shortfall. Top-up plan being developed.

title: GRZ Capital Injection Q1 Milestone Review
description: Zambia Railways to submit Q1 2025 milestone performance report for GRZ capital injection per MoF-DIR-2025-002.
notes: Q1 milestone report submitted. Track rehabilitation Phase 1 contract awarded. Revenue below target.
